message.content:
Thoroughly explore the battle end logic in this UE5 project. I need to understand:

1. How EndBattle is currently implemented in TurnGameMode (Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPTurnGameMode.h and .cpp)
2. The FLFPBattleResult and FLFPBattleRequest structs (likely in LFPGameInstance.h or LFPBattleTypes.h)
3. How the WorldMapGameMode handles battle results after returning (Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapGameMode.h and .cpp)
4. The current capture/betrayal flow - how captured units are recorded and processed
5. What triggers battle end (victory/defeat conditions)

Read all relevant files fully. Focus on the complete data flow from battle ending → recording results → transitioning back to world map → processing results.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore the battle end logic in this UE5 project. Let me start by reading the key files you mentioned.

content.content:
1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Engine/GameInstance.h"
     5→#include "LFPGameInstance.generated.h"
     6→
     7→class ALFPWorldMapNode;
     8→class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
     9→
    10→// 轻量单位数据：跨关卡保存用
    11→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    12→struct FLFPUnitEntry
    13→{
    14→	GENERATED_BODY()
    15→
    16→	// 单位类型 ID（对应 ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset 中的键）
    17→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit")
    18→	FName TypeID = NAME_None;
    19→
    20→	// 单位阶级
    21→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit")
    22→	int32 Tier = 1;
    23→
    24→	bool IsValid() const { return TypeID != NAME_None; }
    25→};
    26→
    27→// 战斗请求：世界地图 → 战斗场景传递的数据
    28→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    29→struct FLFPBattleRequest
    30→{
    31→	GENERATED_BODY()
    32→
    33→	// 触发战斗的节点 ID
    34→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    35→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    36→
    37→	// 战斗地图 CSV 文件名（对应 Saved/Maps/ 下的 CSV）
    38→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    39→	FString BattleMapName;
    40→
    41→	// 敌人星级
    42→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    43→	int32 StarRating = 1;
    44→
    45→	// 是否可逃跑
    46→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    47→	bool bCanEscape = true;
    48→
    49→	// 是否有有效请求
    50→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    51→	bool bIsValid = false;
    52→};
    53→
    54→// 战斗结果：战斗场景 → 世界地图传递的数据
    55→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    56→struct FLFPBattleResult
    57→{
    58→	GENERATED_BODY()
    59→
    60→	// 对应的节点 ID
    61→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    62→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    63→
    64→	// 是否胜利
    65→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    66→	bool bVictory = false;
    67→
    68→	// 是否逃跑
    69→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    70→	bool bEscaped = false;
    71→
    72→	// 战斗中捕获的单位列表（背叛系统触发）
    73→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    74→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> CapturedUnits;
    75→
    76→	// 是否有有效结果
    77→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    78→	bool bIsValid = false;
    79→};
    80→
    81→// 世界地图状态快照：跨关卡保持
    82→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    83→struct FLFPWorldMapSnapshot
    84→{
    85→	GENERATED_BODY()
    86→
    87→	// 当前世界地图名
    88→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    89→	FString WorldMapName;
    90→
    91→	// 玩家当前节点 ID
    92→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    93→	int32 CurrentNodeID = 0;
    94→
    95→	// 已消耗回合数
    96→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    97→	int32 CurrentTurn = 0;
    98→
    99→	// 已访问节点
   100→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   101→	TSet<int32> VisitedNodeIDs;
   102→
   103→	// 已揭露节点
   104→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   105→	TSet<int32> RevealedNodeIDs;
   106→
   107→	// 已触发节点（战斗/事件/Boss 首次触发后不再触发）
   108→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   109→	TSet<int32> TriggeredNodeIDs;
   110→
   111→	// 是否有有效快照
   112→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   113→	bool bIsValid = false;
   114→};
   115→
   116→/**
   117→ * 游戏实例：跨关卡生命周期
   118→ * 负责世界地图 ↔ 战斗场景之间的状态传递
   119→ */
   120→UCLASS()
   121→class LFP2D_API ULFPGameInstance : public UGameInstance
   122→{
   123→	GENERATED_BODY()
   124→
   125→public:
   126→	// ============== 战斗请求/结果 ==============
   127→
   128→	// 设置战斗请求（世界地图调用，进入战斗前）
   129→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   130→	void SetBattleRequest(const FLFPBattleRequest& Request);
   131→
   132→	// 获取战斗请求（战斗场景调用，读取后清除）
   133→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   134→	FLFPBattleRequest ConsumeBattleRequest();
   135→
   136→	// 设置战斗结果（战斗场景调用，结束战斗时）
   137→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   138→	void SetBattleResult(const FLFPBattleResult& Result);
   139→
   140→	// 获取战斗结果（世界地图调用，读取后清除）
   141→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   142→	FLFPBattleResult ConsumeBattleResult();
   143→
   144→	// ============== 世界地图快照 ==============
   145→
   146→	// 保存世界地图状态快照
   147→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   148→	void SaveWorldMapSnapshot(const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& Snapshot);
   149→
   150→	// 获取世界地图快照（不清除，世界地图关卡可多次读取）
   151→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   152→	const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& GetWorldMapSnapshot() const { return WorldMapSnapshot; }
   153→
   154→	// 是否有待处理的战斗结果
   155→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   156→	bool HasPendingBattleResult() const { return PendingBattleResult.bIsValid; }
   157→
   158→	// ============== 场景切换 ==============
   159→
   160→	// 切换到战斗场景
   161→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   162→	void TransitionToBattle(const FString& BattleLevelName);
   163→
   164→	// 切换回世界地图
   165→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   166→	void TransitionToWorldMap(const FString& WorldMapLevelName);
   167→
   168→	// 世界地图关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   169→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   170→	FString DefaultWorldMapLevelName = TEXT("Test_WorldMap");
   171→
   172→	// 战斗关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   173→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   174→	FString DefaultBattleLevelName = TEXT("Test_Fight");
   175→
   176→	// ============== 编队系统 ==============
   177→
   178→	// 单位注册表（蓝图中配置，全局唯一）
   179→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   180→	TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
   181→
   182→	// 出战队伍
   183→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   184→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> PartyUnits;
   185→
   186→	// 备战营
   187→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   188→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> ReserveUnits;
   189→
   190→	// 出战队伍上限
   191→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   192→	int32 MaxPartySize = 3;
   193→
   194→	// 备战营上限
   195→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   196→	int32 MaxReserveSize = 3;
   197→
   198→	// 尝试添加单位：先队伍 → 再备战 → 都满返回 false
   199→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   200→	bool TryAddUnit(const FLFPUnitEntry& Unit);
   201→
   202→	// 队伍是否已满
   203→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   204→	bool IsPartyFull() const { return PartyUnits.Num() >= MaxPartySize; }
   205→
   206→	// 备战营是否已满
   207→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   208→	bool IsReserveFull() const { return ReserveUnits.Num() >= MaxReserveSize; }
   209→
   210→	// 替换队伍中的单位
   211→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   212→	void ReplacePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
   213→
   214→	// 替换备战营中的单位
   215→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   216→	void ReplaceReserveUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
   217→
   218→	// 移除队伍单位
   219→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   220→	void RemovePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex);
   221→
   222→	// 移除备战营单位
   223→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   224→	void RemoveReserveUnit(int32 SlotIndex);
   225→
   226→protected:
   227→	// 待处理的战斗请求
   228→	UPROPERTY()
   229→	FLFPBattleRequest PendingBattleRequest;
   230→
   231→	// 待处理的战斗结果
   232→	UPROPERTY()
   233→	FLFPBattleResult PendingBattleResult;
   234→
   235→	// 世界地图状态快照
   236→	UPROPERTY()
   237→	FLFPWorldMapSnapshot WorldMapSnapshot;
   238→};
   239→

1→// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
     2→
     3→#pragma once
     4→
     5→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     6→#include "GameFramework/GameModeBase.h"
     7→#include "LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h"
     8→#include "LFPTurnGameMode.generated.h"
     9→
    10→class ALFPTacticsUnit;
    11→class ALFPHexGridManager;
    12→class ALFPTurnManager;
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * 战斗游戏模式
    16→ */
    17→UCLASS()
    18→class LFP2D_API ALFPTurnGameMode : public AGameModeBase
    19→{
    20→	GENERATED_BODY()
    21→
    22→public:
    23→	virtual void StartPlay() override;
    24→
    25→	// 结束战斗，写回结果并返回世界地图
    26→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Battle")
    27→	void EndBattle(bool bVictory, bool bEscaped = false);
    28→
    29→	// 获取当前战斗请求
    30→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Battle")
    31→	const FLFPBattleRequest& GetBattleRequest() const { return CachedBattleRequest; }
    32→
    33→	// 是否由世界地图触发的战斗（否则为独立测试）
    34→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Battle")
    35→	bool IsWorldMapBattle() const { return CachedBattleRequest.bIsValid; }
    36→
    37→	// ============== 捕获追踪 ==============
    38→
    39→	// 记录战斗中被捕获的单位（背叛转化后调用）
    40→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Battle")
    41→	void RecordCapturedUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit);
    42→
    43→	// 获取捕获列表
    44→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Battle")
    45→	const TArray<FLFPUnitEntry>& GetCapturedUnits() const { return CapturedUnits; }
    46→
    47→	// 获取网格管理器
    48→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Battle")
    49→	ALFPHexGridManager* GetGridManager() const { return GridManager; }
    50→
    51→	// 获取回合管理器
    52→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Battle")
    53→	ALFPTurnManager* GetTurnManager() const { return TurnManager; }
    54→
    55→protected:
    56→	// 缓存的战斗请求
    57→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Battle")
    58→	FLFPBattleRequest CachedBattleRequest;
    59→
    60→	// 本场捕获的单位列表
    61→	UPROPERTY()
    62→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> CapturedUnits;
    63→
    64→	// 网格管理器类（蓝图中配置）
    65→	UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "Battle")
    66→	TSubclassOf<ALFPHexGridManager> GridManagerClass;
    67→
    68→	// 网格管理器实例
    69→	UPROPERTY()
    70→	TObjectPtr<ALFPHexGridManager> GridManager;
    71→
    72→	// 回合管理器实例
    73→	UPROPERTY()
    74→	TObjectPtr<ALFPTurnManager> TurnManager;
    75→};
    76→

content.text: Now let me read the battle types and world map game mode files:

content.content:
1→// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
     2→
     3→#pragma once
     4→
     5→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     6→#include "LFPBattleTypes.generated.h"
     7→
     8→class ALFPTacticsUnit;
     9→class ULFPSkillBase;
    10→class ALFPHexTile;
    11→
    12→// 单位阵营枚举（从 LFPTacticsUnit.h 迁移至此，供多个系统使用）
    13→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    14→enum class EUnitAffiliation : uint8
    15→{
    16→	UA_Player     UMETA(DisplayName = "Player"),
    17→	UA_Enemy      UMETA(DisplayName = "Enemy"),
    18→	UA_Neutral    UMETA(DisplayName = "Neutral")
    19→};
    20→
    21→// 战斗阶段枚举
    22→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    23→enum class EBattlePhase : uint8
    24→{
    25→	BP_Deployment      UMETA(DisplayName = "Deployment"),
    26→	BP_EnemyPlanning   UMETA(DisplayName = "Enemy Planning"),
    27→	BP_ActionPhase     UMETA(DisplayName = "Action Phase"),
    28→	BP_RoundEnd        UMETA(DisplayName = "Round End")
    29→};
    30→
    31→// 地形类型枚举
    32→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    33→enum class ELFPTerrainType : uint8
    34→{
    35→	TT_Grass   UMETA(DisplayName = "草地"),
    36→	TT_Sand    UMETA(DisplayName = "沙地"),
    37→	TT_Dirt    UMETA(DisplayName = "泥地"),
    38→	TT_Stone   UMETA(DisplayName = "石地"),
    39→	TT_Snow    UMETA(DisplayName = "雪地"),
    40→	TT_Water   UMETA(DisplayName = "水域"),
    41→	TT_Lava    UMETA(DisplayName = "熔岩"),
    42→	TT_Magic   UMETA(DisplayName = "魔法"),
    43→	TT_Bridge  UMETA(DisplayName = "桥")
    44→};
    45→
    46→// 敌人行动计划结构体
    47→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    48→struct FEnemyActionPlan
    49→{
    50→	GENERATED_BODY()
    51→
    52→	// 执行计划的敌方单位
    53→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    54→	ALFPTacticsUnit* EnemyUnit = nullptr;
    55→
    56→	// 选定的技能
    57→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    58→	ULFPSkillBase* PlannedSkill = nullptr;
    59→
    60→	// 目标单位（可能在行动前死亡）
    61→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    62→	ALFPTacticsUnit* TargetUnit = nullptr;
    63→
    64→	// 技能瞄准的格子（= 目标单位规划时所在格子）
    65→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    66→	ALFPHexTile* TargetTile = nullptr;
    67→
    68→	// 敌人移动到的施法位置
    69→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    70→	ALFPHexTile* CasterPositionTile = nullptr;
    71→
    72→	// 技能生效范围内的格子（绝对位置）
    73→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    74→	TArray<ALFPHexTile*> EffectAreaTiles;
    75→
    76→	// 计划是否有效
    77→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    78→	bool bIsValid = false;
    79→
    80→	void Reset()
    81→	{
    82→		EnemyUnit = nullptr;
    83→		PlannedSkill = nullptr;
    84→		TargetUnit = nullptr;
    85→		TargetTile = nullptr;
    86→		CasterPositionTile = nullptr;
    87→		EffectAreaTiles.Empty();
    88→		bIsValid = false;
    89→	}
    90→};
    91→

1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "GameFramework/GameModeBase.h"
     5→#include "LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h"
     6→#include "LFPWorldMapGameMode.generated.h"
     7→
     8→class ALFPWorldMapManager;
     9→class ULFPUnitReplacementWidget;
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * 世界地图游戏模式
    13→ * 负责世界地图场景的初始化和管理
    14→ */
    15→UCLASS()
    16→class LFP2D_API ALFPWorldMapGameMode : public AGameModeBase
    17→{
    18→	GENERATED_BODY()
    19→
    20→protected:
    21→	virtual void StartPlay() override;
    22→
    23→	// 处理战斗结果
    24→	void HandleBattleResult(const FLFPBattleResult& Result);
    25→
    26→	// 处理捕获的单位（加入编队/后备/显示替换 UI）
    27→	void ProcessCapturedUnits(const TArray<FLFPUnitEntry>& CapturedUnits);
    28→
    29→	// 显示下一个替换 UI
    30→	void ShowNextReplacementUI();
    31→
    32→	// 替换 UI 完成回调
    33→	UFUNCTION()
    34→	void OnReplacementComplete();
    35→
    36→public:
    37→	// 世界地图管理器引用
    38→	UPROPERTY()
    39→	TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapManager> WorldMapManager;
    40→
    41→	// 世界地图管理器类（蓝图中配置）
    42→	UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
    43→	TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapManager> WorldMapManagerClass;
    44→
    45→	// 默认世界地图名（首次加载用）
    46→	UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
    47→	FString DefaultWorldMapName;
    48→
    49→	// 默认起始节点 ID
    50→	UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
    51→	int32 DefaultStartNodeID = 0;
    52→
    53→	// 替换 UI Widget 类（蓝图中配置）
    54→	UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "UI")
    55→	TSubclassOf<ULFPUnitReplacementWidget> ReplacementWidgetClass;
    56→
    57→	// 获取世界地图管理器
    58→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
    59→	ALFPWorldMapManager* GetWorldMapManager() const { return WorldMapManager; }
    60→
    61→private:
    62→	// 待处理的捕获单位队列
    63→	UPROPERTY()
    64→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> PendingCapturedUnits;
    65→
    66→	// 替换 UI 实例
    67→	UPROPERTY()
    68→	TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitReplacementWidget> ReplacementWidget;
    69→};
    70→

1→// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
     2→
     3→#pragma once
     4→
     5→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     6→#include "LFP2D/Unit/Betrayal/LFPBetrayalCondition.h"
     7→#include "LFP2D/Unit/LFPTacticsUnit.h"
     8→#include "LFPBCondition_HPLack.generated.h"
     9→
    10→/**
    11→ * 
    12→ */
    13→UCLASS()
    14→class LFP2D_API ULFPBCondition_HPLack : public ULFPBetrayalCondition
    15→{
    16→	GENERATED_BODY()
    17→
    18→public:
    19→	virtual bool CheckCondition_Implementation(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit) override
    20→	{
    21→		return Unit && Unit->GetCurrentHealth() <= HealthThreshold;
    22→	}
    23→
    24→private:
    25→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, Category = "Condition")
    26→	int32 HealthThreshold = 3;
    27→};
    28→
